hyperedges.label: ETL to Training to Serving Pipeline Flow
Prediction Request Lifecycle (Validate-Predict-Persist)
Docker Compose Service Orchestration Stack
NHANES 2013 Pipeline Data Flow (raw -> preprocessed -> models -> reports)
NHANES 2015 Pipeline Data Flow (raw -> preprocessed -> models -> reports)
Production Serving Layer (stable-path models + metadata)
Unsupervised Exploration Pipeline (PCA + K-Means + Profiling)
Cluster Selection Methodology (Elbow + Silhouette + Visual Validation)
PCA Visualization Suite (Scree + Cluster + Age + Longevity Views)
Longevity Classification Model Comparison (DT vs RF vs XGBoost)
XGBoost Threshold Optimization Workflow (curve + tuned CM)
Classification Reporting Suite (04 notebook outputs)
XGBoost Regression Diagnostic Visualization Suite
